data.school_name: University of Texas at Austin's McCombs School of Business
data.key_differentiators: McCombs offers a flexible curriculum where more than 70% of coursework is self-selected, with over 100 electives and 20+ concentrations (14 STEM-designated). Located in vibrant Austin with strong tech company presence including Dell, IBM, Amazon, and Apple, the program emphasizes diversity and innovation with students from 28 countries.
